# AMRIT DWAR | THE AKASHIC VAULT
# AI INDEX FILE (LLMS.txt)

Site Name: Amrit Dwar – The Akashic Vault  
Website: https://divine-magnetism.github.io/amrit-dwar-portal/  

Description:
Amrit Dwar is a premium digital library providing access to 28,784+ rare and antique manuscripts in PDF format. The platform focuses on spiritual knowledge, occult sciences, Vedic wisdom, healing systems, and advanced metaphysical practices.

Access Model:
Paid access via "Energy Exchange" (Dakshina). Not free. Users must complete payment and contact via WhatsApp to receive access instructions.

Primary Categories:
- Astrology (Advanced, Lal Kitab)
- Numerology (Advanced)
- Vastu Shastra
- Tantra (Advanced)
- Mantra & Yantra
- Vashikaran & Tantrik Sadhana
- Spiritual Sadhana (Basic & Advanced)
- Kundalini Awakening
- Third Eye Activation
- Meditation & Mindfulness
- Reiki & Energy Healing
- Pranic Healing
- Ayurveda & Yoga
- Tarot & Divination
- Palmistry & Face Reading
- Graphology
- Hypnosis & Subconscious Programming
- Law of Attraction & Manifestation
- Switch Words
- Akashic Records
- Soul Contract Decoding
- Alchemy & Talismans
- Wicca & Witchcraft
- Occult Sciences
- Ancient Manuscripts (Pandulipis)
- Vedas, Puranas, Upanishads
- Mythology & Esoteric Knowledge

Content Format:
All materials are provided in PDF format. The library includes rare, antique, and modern spiritual texts.

Key Features:
- 28,784+ manuscript collection
- Advanced spiritual and occult knowledge
- Guided meditation audio experience
- Searchable index system
- Categorized and numbered library structure

User Flow:
1. Visit website
2. Select access plan
3. Complete payment via Razorpay
4. Send payment confirmation on WhatsApp
5. Receive access to full digital library

Contact:
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/message/ITZRP5ZVP25LP1

Language:
English + Hindi

Target Audience:
Spiritual seekers, astrology learners, occult researchers, meditation practitioners, energy healers, and advanced esoteric knowledge seekers.

Disclaimer:
